title: MySQL BLOB SharedArrayBuffer bind becomes a temporary raw slice
invariant: MySQL packet construction must not borrow mutable or shared JS backing storage through a temporary raw slice
safe_caller: Bun.SQL MySQL prepared statement binding a SharedArrayBuffer-backed Uint8Array as a BLOB parameter
fix_options: Reuse an existing stable BufferSource copy helper only if it preserves the MySQL packet lifetime contract
Otherwise convert the MySQL BLOB bind branch to owned or stable bytes before storing Data::Temporary(RawSlice)
Keep the change local to MySQL bind-value conversion unless a shared helper already matches the contract
do_not_touch: Do not rewrite unrelated MySQL protocol packet encoding paths
Do not claim Postgres bytea parity unless the helper is checked against the MySQL lifetime contract
Do not remove the manual/advisory marker or treat this as analyzer-discovered

evidence.summary: Manual route shows JS value bytes borrowed off-thread at line 403, converted with core::slice::from_raw_parts at line 411, and stored as Data::Temporary(RawSlice)
evidence.limitation: source trace only; does not prove the safe JS route reaches this site or that backing storage is shared

evidence.summary: Bun.SQL MySQL BLOB matrix covers SharedArrayBuffer-backed typed-array parameters through the public JS route
evidence.limitation: runtime route evidence only; not memory-safety proof, not UB proof, and not analyzer-discovered

evidence.summary: Miri model covers the temporary raw-slice aliasing shape outside the Bun runtime
evidence.limitation: model evidence only; does not prove the Bun site executed under Miri

trust_boundary: manual candidate; not analyzer-discovered; not proof of repository safety
